protocol.positive_definition: A document that AksharaMD's block-level multicolumn detector SHOULD fire on because its extracted block sequence exhibits column-interleaving OR its underlying source has multi-column layout that produces reading-order damage in the compiled Markdown.
protocol.negative_definition: A document with single-column source layout or with source multi-column layout that AksharaMD nevertheless renders in correct reading order (i.e. no observable interleaving in `document.md`).
protocol.unknown_definition: Document layout has not been visually verified for this evaluation. Reported alongside metrics but not counted in confusion matrix.
protocol.unit_of_evaluation: document (top-level warning decision). Page-level detector diagnostics are also reported when available (multicolumn_diagnostics.page_analyses).
protocol.warning_decision_rule: Positive prediction iff `W_MULTICOLUMN_ORDER` appears in the compiled document's `warning_codes`. Otherwise negative.
protocol.ambiguous_case_policy: If visual layout is single-column but detector's block-level diagnostics show a spurious geometric signal below the warn threshold, count as TN and note under `notes`. If a multicolumn document produces correct reading order without firing, count as FN (block-level detection missed it) and note that span-level detection would be required.
protocol.backend: PyMuPDF primary + pdfplumber fallback; boundaries via _detect_column_boundaries (post-#54 with _MIN_LINES_PER_COLUMN_CLUSTER=2).

known_FN_class: simple2 (span-level interleaving; block-level detector cannot see these by design)

protocol.external_assets_note: The ParseBench binary corpus used for the Phase 5 numbers is not present in this repository. This recalibration measures against only the public corpus that ships in `benchmarks/.public_corpus/pdf/`. The Phase 5 numbers are retained for historical comparison but the two corpora are not directly comparable.

001-trivial/minimal-document.pdf.evidence: Rendered — one paragraph, single-column, no column structure at all.

002-trivial-libre-office-writer/002-triv.evidence: LibreOffice Writer trivial output; single-column by default.

003-pdflatex-image/pdflatex-image.pdf.evidence: pdflatex article class with an embedded image — single-column.

004-pdflatex-4-pages/pdflatex-4-pages.pd.evidence: Rendered all 4 pages — plain single-column blindtext with centered page number.
004-pdflatex-4-pages/pdflatex-4-pages.pd.notes: This was the Issue #54 reproducer. Post-c4dfe86 the detector correctly does not fire on this document.

005-libreoffice-writer-password/libreoff.evidence: Encrypted; intentional-failure asset. Excluded from confusion matrix.

006-pdflatex-outline/pdflatex-outline.pd.evidence: pdflatex article class with hierarchical outline — single-column body across all pages.

007-imagemagick-images/imagemagick-image.evidence: Image-only PDF; no text spans available for column detection. Excluded.
007-imagemagick-images/imagemagick-image.excluded_reason: no text — detector has no input

008-reportlab-inline-image/reportlab-inl.evidence: Reportlab-generated PDF with inline image; single-column by construction (default reportlab).

009-pdflatex-geotopo/GeoTopo.pdf.evidence: German math textbook (Topologie). Rendered p20, p60 — both are single-column body with inline figures and math. Verified single-column throughout the sample.
009-pdflatex-geotopo/GeoTopo.pdf.notes: Post-c4dfe86 W_MULTICOLUMN_ORDER fires on 15 pages (9, 15, 23, 29, 35, 39, 40, 56, 71, 76, 80, 81, 91, 101, 108). All 15 are false positives — they are pages with equations, itemised lists, figures, or captions that create geometric artefacts (transition_rate 0.29–0.71) without a real column boundary. Top document-level FP for the recalibration.

GeoTopo-komprimiert.pdf.evidence: Compressed variant of 009-pdflatex-geotopo/GeoTopo.pdf. Same content, same layout.
GeoTopo-komprimiert.pdf.notes: Same 15-page firing pattern as GeoTopo.pdf. Counted as a duplicate FP for the corpus; kept in the run to prove determinism across a compression variant.

reportlab-inline-image.pdf.evidence: reportlab inline-image test fixture; single-column by construction. Matches asset name `inline-image.pdf` in the corpus.

libre-office-link.pdf.evidence: LibreOffice link fixture; short single-column body.

output_with_metadata_pymupdf.pdf.evidence: XMP metadata fixture. Compiled band POOR 47 suggests very sparse body — likely no column structure to speak of.

crazyones-pdfa.pdf.evidence: PDF/A conformance fixture. Compiled band HIGH 87 — has real single-column text.

pdfkit.pdf.evidence: pdfkit output fixture. Compiled band POOR 47 — sparse.

mistitled_outlines_example.pdf.evidence: Outline-metadata fixture. Compiled band OK 81 with 4 pages — non-trivial body.

reportlab-overlay.pdf.evidence: Reportlab overlay fixture. Compiled band RISKY 67 — has some text.

wrong-references.pdf.evidence: Image-references-deduplication fixture. Compiled band POOR 47 — sparse text.

010-pdflatex-forms/pdflatex-forms.pdf.evidence: PDF form; sparse text. No real column layout.

013-reportlab-overlay/reportlab-overlay..evidence: Not previously inspected; classified after run.

014-outlines/outlines.pdf.evidence: Outline metadata test; layout not previously inspected.

015-arabic/habibi.pdf.evidence: Arabic RTL script; body text extraction is sparse. Not a fair multicolumn test case.
015-arabic/habibi.pdf.excluded_reason: RTL / sparse extraction; detector has insufficient signal

015-arabic/habibi-rotated.pdf.evidence: Rotated Arabic pages; body content is rasterised. Excluded.

018-base64-image/018-base64-image.pdf.evidence: Base64 image fixture; likely no plain text.

019-grayscale-image/019-grayscale-image..evidence: Grayscale image fixture; likely no plain text.

026-latex-multicolumn/multicolumn.pdf.evidence: Rendered p2 — genuine two-column LaTeX academic layout. Compiled Markdown shows span-level interleaving (documented in ADVANCED_FIDELITY_2026-07-18.md §F1).
026-latex-multicolumn/multicolumn.pdf.notes: Post-c4dfe86 the detector now fires (W_MULTICOLUMN_ORDER) — this is the primary TP for the recalibration.

027-cropped-rotated-scaled/cropped-rotat.evidence: Cropped/rotated/scaled pages with very sparse text. No column structure.
027-cropped-rotated-scaled/cropped-rotat.excluded_reason: sparse text — detector has insufficient signal
